tasks.title: Fix custom tool discovery format mismatch
tasks.description: Fix custom tool discovery format mismatch between tool discovery and registration
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify custom tools are discovered with correct format
AddIntegrationTest: verify discovered tools can be registered and executed via ToolRegistry
RunTestSuite: execute tool discovery and registration tests to ensure no regressions
tasks.impl_notes: Tools module handles discovery and registration. Ensure format consistency.

tasks.title: Register custom tools with ToolRegistry
tasks.description: Register custom tools with ToolRegistry for execution
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify custom tools are registered in ToolRegistry
AddIntegrationTest: verify registered tools can be executed via registry
RunTestSuite: execute tool registration tests
tasks.impl_notes: Use ToolRegistry::register() for custom tool registration

tasks.title: Implement plugin tool registration
tasks.description: Implement plugin tool registration mechanism in plugin module
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify plugin tools are registered correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify plugins can register tools and tools are executable
RunTestSuite: execute plugin tests to ensure tool registration works
tasks.impl_notes: Plugin system must integrate with ToolRegistry

tasks.title: Fix non-deterministic hook execution order
tasks.description: Fix non-deterministic hook execution order using IndexMap with priority ordering
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify hook execution order is deterministic
AddRegressionTest: ensure hook execution order is consistent across multiple runs
RunTestSuite: execute plugin hook tests multiple times to verify determinism
tasks.impl_notes: Use IndexMap with priority ordering to ensure deterministic hook execution

tasks.title: Enforce plugin config ownership
tasks.description: Enforce plugin config ownership with server/runtime split
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify server config and runtime config are properly isolated
AddErrorHandlingTest: test that plugins cannot modify server-owned config
RunTestSuite: execute config ownership tests
tasks.impl_notes: Config crate enforces server/runtime ownership split

tasks.title: Implement full config crate
tasks.description: Implement full config crate with 1581+ lines, PRD 19 compliant
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify all config loading and parsing works correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify config integrates with all modules
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing functionality is not broken by config changes
RunTestSuite: execute all config tests and integration tests
tasks.impl_notes: Full config crate implementation with PRD 19 compliance, 1581+ lines

tasks.title: Begin Phase 6 Release Qualification
tasks.description: Start the final release qualification phase encompassing end-to-end testing, performance benchmarking, security audit, and observability validation
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify session creation and lifecycle works end-to-end
AddIntegrationTest: verify message processing flow works end-to-end
AddIntegrationTest: verify tool execution pipeline works end-to-end
AddIntegrationTest: verify MCP server connection and tool execution works
AddIntegrationTest: verify LSP diagnostics flow works end-to-end
AddIntegrationTest: verify plugin hook execution works end-to-end
AddRegressionTest: ensure all Phase 6 components integrate correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Primary focus for this iteration. Covers subtasks 6.1.1 through 6.1.6. Added 3 new test files: lsp_diagnostics_tests.rs, plugin_hook_tests.rs, phase6_regression_tests.rs. Enhanced mcp_protocol_tests.rs with comprehensive MCP server connection and tool execution tests.

tasks.title: Create end-to-end integration test suite
tasks.description: Create comprehensive end-to-end integration test suite for Phase 6 release
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify complete user workflow from start to finish
AddIntegrationTest: verify tool execution through entire pipeline
AddRegressionTest: ensure all modules work together without regressions
RunTestSuite: execute full integration test suite
tasks.impl_notes: Integration tests should cover all major workflows

tasks.title: Run performance benchmarks
tasks.description: Run performance benchmarks for startup time, latency, and memory usage
test_criteria: AddBenchmarkTest: measure startup time is within acceptable thresholds
AddBenchmarkTest: measure tool execution latency is within acceptable thresholds
AddBenchmarkTest: measure memory usage is within acceptable thresholds
RunTestSuite: execute benchmarks and compare against baseline
tasks.impl_notes: Focus on startup time, latency, and memory benchmarks

tasks.title: Conduct security audit
tasks.description: Conduct security audit covering permission boundaries, authentication, and validation
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify permission boundaries are enforced correctly
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify authentication works correctly
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify input validation prevents injection attacks
AddRegressionTest: ensure security fixes do not break existing functionality
RunTestSuite: execute security-related tests
tasks.impl_notes: Focus on permission boundaries, auth, and validation security

tasks.title: Validate observability
tasks.description: Validate observability including logging and tracing
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify logging outputs correct information
AddIntegrationTest: verify tracing spans are properly created and closed
AddRegressionTest: ensure observability changes do not impact performance
RunTestSuite: execute observability tests
tasks.impl_notes: Validate logging and tracing are working correctly

tasks.title: Fix GitLab CI integration tests
tasks.description: Fix 7 integration tests in crates/git/src/gitlab_ci.rs that require a real GitLab server at http://127.0.0.1:63182
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify GitLab CI tests can run with mock server OR are properly ignored
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify tests handle missing GitLab server gracefully
RunTestSuite: execute git tests to ensure proper handling

tasks.title: Mark GitLab tests with #[ignore]
tasks.description: Mark GitLab tests with #[ignore] and document as requiring external GitLab server
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify ignored tests are properly marked and documented
RunTestSuite: execute non-ignored tests to ensure they pass
tasks.impl_notes: Alternative to P1-8. Mark with #[ignore] and add documentation.

tasks.title: Create mock GitLab server for CI
tasks.description: Create mock GitLab server for CI to enable GitLab integration tests
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify mock GitLab server responds correctly to API calls
AddIntegrationTest: verify integration tests pass with mock server
RunTestSuite: execute full git test suite with mock server
tasks.impl_notes: Alternative to P1-7. Create mock server for CI testing.

tasks.title: Fix desktop_web_different_ports test
tasks.description: Fix desktop_web_different_ports test that uses hardcoded port 3000 which conflicts with other processes. Use dynamic port allocation instead.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify dynamic port allocation works correctly
AddRegressionTest: ensure desktop_web_different_ports test passes with dynamic ports
RunTestSuite: execute CLI tests to verify fix
tasks.impl_notes: Use dynamic port allocation instead of hardcoded port 3000

RunTestSuite: execute config tests
